summary: Tested damage fixation workflow and document generation features. All 14 backend tests passed. Document generation (Return Act, Defect Act) working correctly with modern design. Fixed bug where Defect Act button checked damage.rows instead of damage.items.

ui_bugs.issue: Defect Act button condition was checking damage.rows instead of damage.items (API returns items)

integration_issues.issue: Page stuck on 'Завантаження ордера...' during Playwright testing - may be network/timeout issue in test environment

critical_code_review_comments: DamageModal.jsx line 759: Queue selection clarification text is present as required
product_damage_history.py lines 228-230: photo_only processing correctly does NOT freeze products
Defect Act template has 'Тип' column with colored badges (Втрата, Фіксація, В стан)
Return Act template has modern design with pre-issue damage comparison section
seed_data_creation: Created test damage records with photo_only processing type for orders 7425 and 7414
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document generation APIs working correctly. Defect Act shows type badges (Втрата for total_loss, Фіксація for photo_only). Return Act has modern design with pre-issue damage comparison. Test orders: 7425 (pre_issue damage), 7414 (total_loss with 420 grn fee). ReturnSettlementPage had bug where defect act button checked damage.rows instead of damage.items - FIXED.

verified_features.return_act_generation: PASS - Modern styled HTML with damage data, pre-issue comparison, client info
verified_features.defect_act_generation: PASS - Includes photo_only with 'Фіксація' label, total_loss with 'Втрата' label
verified_features.defect_act_button_condition: FIXED - Now checks damage.items.length > 0 instead of damage.rows.length > 0
verified_features.photo_only_no_freeze: PASS - Backend correctly does NOT freeze products for photo_only processing_type
verified_features.damage_modal_queue_text: PASS - Shows clarification text '(обов'язково для В стан декору, за бажанням для фіксації)'
verified_features.document_preview: PASS - Both Return Act and Defect Act preview render properly with modern design
